rationale: The DeepSeek candidate provides a more natural translation of technical terms. For example, it uses 'أمرّي' (Imperative) and 'عودي' (Recursive) which are standard in Arabic computer science contexts, whereas the GPT candidate uses 'الإمبراطورية' (Empire/Imperial) which is a common mistranslation of 'Imperative' in this context. Both candidates correctly handled the MDX requirements and asset path adjustments.
